characters.appearance: A stylized, cartoonish green owl with large eyes, a yellow beak, and a simple rounded body.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, ranging from encouraging to angry.

characters.appearance: A stylized 2D cartoon teenage girl with a pale complexion, short purple hair covering one eye, and a slender build.
A stylized 2D cartoon man with a broad build, light complexion, and short blonde hair.
characters.wardrobe: A red tracksuit with a white zipper and a pink shirt underneath.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the user by immediately addressing their specific, real-world English needs.
- Replaces generic language selection with practical goals relevant to working Indian adults.
- Establishes Supernova as a targeted, goal-oriented learning tool.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova पर आप क्या सीखना चाहते हैं? [What do you want to learn on Supernova?]
Office English
Interview Practice
Daily Conversations
CONTINUE

scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates a grammar exercise using a highly relatable workplace scenario (sending an email).
- Shows the app's error-correction mechanism.
- Adds a warm, encouraging Hindi phrase at the end to soften the 'Incorrect' feedback, matching the 'older sibling' brand voice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Complete the translation
मैंने क्लाइंट को ईमेल भेज दिया है।
I have already ___ the email to the client.
send
sent
CONTINUE
CHECK
Incorrect
Correct Answer:
sent
GOT IT
Keep trying! गलती से ही सीखते हैं! [We learn from mistakes!]

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: मुझे उम्मीद नहीं थी कि आप मेरी इतनी मदद करेंगे! [I didn't expect you to help me so much!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the AI speaking practice feature, a core Supernova offering.
- Replaces the English-only prompt with a Hindi-to-English translation and speaking task, fitting the Hindi-first audience.
- Provides positive bilingual reinforcement upon completion.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Translate and Speak
मुझे उम्मीद नहीं थी कि आप मेरी इतनी मदद करेंगे!
TAP TO SPEAK
CONTINUE
Nicely done! बहुत बढ़िया! [Very good!]

scenes.supernova_script: Character C says: कल मीटिंग है, अलार्म सेट कर लो। [Tomorrow is the meeting, set the alarm.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows a listening and typing exercise based on practical, everyday vocabulary.
- Maintains the dramatic beat of making a mistake and learning from it.
- Reinforces the Hindi-medium learning approach.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Listen and Type
कल मीटिंग है, अलार्म सेट कर लो।
Tomorrow is the meeting, ___ the alarm.
set
CHECK
Incorrect
Correct Answer:
Tomorrow is the meeting, please set the alarm.
GOT IT

scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final Call to Action.
- Strips the competitor's 'free' claim, replacing it with Supernova's core promise of speaking English confidently.
- Removes competitor branding and aggressive 'world's #1' hype for a more grounded, trustworthy tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova के साथ confidently English बोलें [Speak English confidently with Supernova]
Supernova
Download the app today.
Download on the App Store
GET IT ON Google Play
